chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 397 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2136/2025. 2. For orders on office objection No.22. 3. For orders on CMA No.2137/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 Mr. Asadullah Jan, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. This petition seeks directions to the respondent 2, prima facie, based in Islamabad with respect to a complaint/application filed there before in Islamabad, as discernable from page 31 of court file. No case is made out for assumption of jurisdiction since the matter pertains to Islamabad. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
